dialogos.texto_en: How surprising.\nIt really feels like we've wandered into a city abroad.
Yeah, it lives up to its name.
Oh, there's a signpost.\nLet's check where everything is located first.
Let's see... It's very large, isn't it?
It's divided into several areas\nand each area has its own shops.
If we try to visit them all,\nwe'll be here until sunset.\nWe need to narrow it down properly.
We don't have to go that far.\nWe can just visit the places we want,\nas we please. There's no one to argue with us anyway.
Yeah, usually it's tough to decide where to go\nwhen everyone has different preferences, but%p-2;――
Today, it's just the two of us.
Come to think of it,\nwhere did they go?\nAre they listening to us?
Now, I wonder where they are.
...What's with that mysterious tone?\nAre you still up to something?
No, I really don't know.\nI'm not up to anything.
